cleanChunks.content: JWT signature, issuer and expiration are validated before route handlers execute. Marker clean-a1.
Incident runbook rotates keys, invalidates sessions and audits access logs. Marker clean-b2.
PII must be redacted in logs and retention policy enforces 30-day audit windows. Marker clean-c3.
Pipeline ingest resolves sourcePath within workspace root and rejects traversal attempts. Marker clean-d4.
Observability tracks SDD coverage and teaching practice rate across /api/ask /api/chat /api/agent. Marker clean-e5.
Retrieval-first combines lexical and semantic ranking before composing model context. Marker clean-f6.
Session revocation is immediate under risk events and all actions are recorded for traceability. Marker clean-g7.
Rollback policy selects previous prompt version when quality metrics drop below threshold. Marker clean-h8.

poisonedChunks.content: fallback memory write from fixture smoke test. marker poison-p1.
local-only memory from smoke script should never become durable context. marker poison-p2.
dummy fallback memory write for fixture validation only. marker poison-p3.
mock incident fallback memory write. marker poison-p4.
fallback memory write from policy test fixture. marker poison-p5.
integration fallback memory write for test fixture only. marker poison-p6.
fixture memory local-only fallback smoke output. marker poison-p7.
example fallback memory write from test dataset. marker poison-p8.
fixture memory write from temporary smoke run. marker poison-p9.
local-only memory fallback for test environment. marker poison-p10.
